description:
Verso, upper text block: Panegyric in to a notable woman in Egypt followed by an appeal for assistance in rhymed prose. All in Hebrew. 

Verso, lower text block: A second piece of paper was glued to the bottom, containing a different poem in the same hand, at 90 degrees to the upper text block. This poem is very faded.

Recto: On the larger page created from the two pieces of paper that were glued together, there is a third poem, in the same hand, this one a panegyric to a male notable.
description_he: גב, בלוק עליון: שיר שבח לאישה נכבדת במצרים ובקשת עזרה, בפרוזה מחורזת. גב, בלוק תחתון (מודבק): שיר נוסף, דהוי. פנים: שיר שבח שלישי לנכבד גברי.
